form.formComment: Won two starts back at Wentworth Park over 720m in 41.93. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 720m at Wentworth Park at NG level. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. In the mix.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Q Parklands over 710m in 41.57 last start, beating Akela Ninjutsu. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he recorded a slick 34.83 over 605m when went down narrowly, at Dubbo. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn out of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Q Parklands over 600m. Last start finished 3rd in a OPEN on April 11 over 642m at Q Lakeside behind Highway Princess beaten 6 lengths (36.42). Well-performed from this draw. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior she clocked a hot 42.02 over 720m finishing second at Wentworth Park. Can come into calculations at odds.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Placed last time (34.53) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing second and beaten one length. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed seven times. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior was an impressive winner after tracking the speed, scoring by a neck in a Grade 5 at Wentworth Park and clocking a fast 29.80 over the 520m trip. Should be in this for a long way.
